hooks.command: bash -c 'VENV=~/.academic-research/venv; if [ ! -d "$VENV" ]; then echo "⚠️ academic-research: Python venv not found. Run /academic-research:setup"; exit 0; fi; $VENV/bin/python -c "import httpx, PyPDF2, openpyxl, yaml" 2>/dev/null && echo "✅ academic-research: Python environment ready" || echo "⚠️ academic-research: Missing dependencies. Run: $VENV/bin/pip install -r ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/requirements.txt"'
